raw.message: You are a WSOP player, of course you get a Daily Bonus 🤑

hook.summary: High-energy flashing text announcing a major update or return event.
hook.visual_action: Fast-paced text overlays 'BIGGEST WELCOME BACK EVER' against a neon laser background.

scene_flow: High-energy text intro announcing the 'Biggest Welcome Back Ever!' with neon laser effects.
Showcase of rewards including massive stacks of poker chips and spinning gold/silver wheels.
Introduction of the 'Epic Benefits Bundle' and the 'All-New Loot Lane' feature.
A female character avatar appears with a speech bubble saying 'the chips are on me!'.
Final end card with the game logo and a 'CLAIM NOW' call-to-action button.
audience_proxy: Adult poker enthusiasts and casual casino game players looking for high-stakes rewards and new features.
